falsification_conditions.condition: S&P 500 closes below 4200 at any point in the next 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A break below the August 2024 low would invalidate the 79% bottom pattern match, as the prior structure would be violated rather than forming a base

falsification_conditions.condition: VIX closes above 35 for two consecutive days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: This would signal capitulation-level fear inconsistent with a bottom formation, indicating the pattern match failed and a lower low is likely developing rather than a sustainable floor

falsification_conditions.condition: 10Y-2Y Treasury yield curve uninverts and steepens by more than 50 basis points (10Y yield rises >2Y yield by 0.50% or more from current levels)
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A rapid re-steepening would indicate recession confirmation rather than soft landing, invalidating the bottom_2024_aug analog which assumed disinflationary stabilization without economic contraction

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
